theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Targeting back-office operators and wholesalers who need maximum clarity and speed. Data density is prioritized over decorative whitespace. Color is strictly functional (status only), and the interface feels like an invisible, high-performance command center (Linear/Vercel benchmark).

rules: Use Geist Mono for Order IDs, SKU codes, and Confidence percentages.
Aggressively round large numbers (e.g., 1.2K instead of 1,234).

spacing_and_layout.navigation: 240px persistent left sidebar. Collapses to 64px icon rail on small screens.
spacing_and_layout.density: 3:1 density ratio. High-value zones (data tables, line items) use tight gutters (gap-2 to gap-4) and smaller text (text-sm).

components.strategy: Shadcn heavily customized for a flat, technical look.

customizations.radius: rounded-md (max 6px radius globally). No pill shapes unless it's a status badge.
customizations.shadows: REMOVE ALL DROP SHADOWS. Rely entirely on 1px borders (border-slate-200) to separate elements.
customizations.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover state: border darkens to border-slate-300.
customizations.tables: Dense rows (py-2), sticky headers, visual status indicators in the first column. Row grouping for large orders.
customizations.modals: Use Glassmorphism (Crystal/Apple variant) for modal overlays (bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm) and crisp white dialog boxes.

components.ai_extraction_workflow: Visualize extraction as a step-card pipeline (Source -> Parsing -> Validation -> Ready). Use skeleton loaders for 'Parsing' state.

principles: No spinners. Use skeleton screens for smoother perceived performance.
Hover states must instantly elevate border contrast or background tint.

icons.usage: Use Duotone or Regular weights. Keep consistent 20px size for nav, 16px for inline data.

images.description: Minimalist desk setup, use as an illustration for 'Inbox Zero' / 'No Pending Orders'.
Warehouse interior. Use heavily overlaid (bg-slate-900/80) on the login/register screen side panel.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Status colors must be legible against their light backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based format (e.g., data-testid='order-validate-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge.
Since we are using .js/.jsx, ensure all components and page structures reflect pure JavaScript syntax (no TypeScript interfaces/types).
Override default shadcn Card and Button styles to remove shadows and implement crisp 1px borders.
Implement a 240px collapsible sidebar for navigation.
For the 'New Order' capture screen, create a unified dropzone/paste area that feels like a command palette.
The AI extraction review screen must show original source (e.g., PDF viewer) alongside extracted line items for 1:1 validation.
Apply `data-testid` attributes religiously to all buttons, links, form inputs, and status badges.
